channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Access Blocked Notice from News Corp Australia Website
item.description: The page you attempted to access on News Corp Australia's website could not be loaded because the system detected what it believes might be automated bot activity. This message is a standard response ...

item.title: Kerala set to announce new Chief Minister; Tamil Nadu CM Vijay faces floor test amid AIADMK split

item.title: Kazuko Higa and the Japanese Holdouts on Anatahan Island
item.description: During World War II, the small volcanic island of Anatahan in the Northern Mariana Islands became the stage for one of the war’s most unusual survival stories. Kazuko Higa, an Okinawan woman in her la...

item.title: MP Fadiel Adams arrested amid ongoing allegations of police corruption

item.title: Mark Bouris Analyses Key Points of the Albanese Government's Federal Budget
item.description: Finance expert Mark Bouris provides an in-depth overview of the Albanese government's latest federal budget. While the original article contains limited details, Bouris is known for breaking down comp...

item.title: A Retrospective on Eve Arden’s Career and Portraits in the 1940s
item.description: Eve Arden, born Eunice Mary Quedens in 1908, was a celebrated American actress known for her sharp wit, comedic timing, and distinctive deadpan delivery. Throughout the 1940s, she became a reliable ch...

item.title: Far-right pastor targets Vivek Ramaswamy with racist remarks during political dispute

item.description: Saskatchewan continues to face significant challenges in recruiting and retaining paramedics as emergency call volumes rise across the province. At a recent conference in Saskatoon, paramedics reporte...

item.title: Russia’s Victory Day Parade Reflects Military Caution and International Isolation
item.description: This year’s Victory Day parade in Moscow, held on 9 May, highlighted a Russia markedly more cautious and isolated than in previous years. Traditionally a display of military pride and national strengt...

item.title: Popular fast food product now available in major supermarkets
item.description: A well-loved fast food item has finally hit the shelves of major supermarkets across Australia, giving fans the chance to enjoy it at home. The product has been in high demand, often prompting long qu...

item.description: The 2026 Stella Prize shortlist showcases six diverse works by women writers that confront themes of violence, loss, and resilience in contemporary society. Evelyn Araluen’s poetry collection, The Rot...

item.description: Nurses in British Columbia have overwhelmingly voted in favour of job action, signalling growing frustration with working conditions across the province. According to the B.C. Nurses' Union, more than...

item.title: Belinda Joanna Opens Up About Partner Cheating and Friend's Betrayal
item.description: Belinda Joanna, widely known for her role as Kobi in the TV series Maria, recently shared her emotional struggle after discovering that her partner cheated on her with a close friend. The actress reve...
